name: IdsLfstylRateFctrRowCntBal

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH stg AS (SELECT SRC.LFSTYL_RATE_FCTR_ID AS SRC_LFSTYL_RATE_FCTR_ID, SRC.MBR_LFSTYL_BNF_CD AS SRC_MBR_LFSTYL_BNF_CD, SRC.LFSTYL_RATE_FCTR_EFF_DT AS SRC_LFSTYL_RATE_FCTR_EFF_DT, SRC.SRC_SYS_CD AS SRC_SRC_SYS_CD, TRGT.LFSTYL_RATE_FCTR_ID AS TRGT_LFSTYL_RATE_FCTR_ID, TRGT.MBR_LFSTYL_BNF_CD AS TRGT_MBR_LFSTYL_BNF_CD, TRGT.LFSTYL_RATE_FCTR_EFF_DT AS TRGT_LFSTYL_RATE_FCTR_EFF_DT, TRGT.SRC_SYS_CD AS TRGT_SRC_SYS_CD FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.B_LFSTYL_RATE_FCTR AS SRC FULL OUTER JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.LFSTYL_RATE_FCTR AS TRGT ON SRC.LFSTYL_RATE_FCTR_ID = TRGT.LFSTYL_RATE_FCTR_ID AND SRC.MBR_LFSTYL_BNF_CD = TRGT.MBR_LFSTYL_BNF_CD AND SRC.LFSTYL_RATE_FCTR_EFF_DT = TRGT.LFSTYL_RATE_FCTR_EFF_DT AND SRC.SRC_SYS_CD = TRGT.SRC_SYS_CD WHERE TRGT.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK = @{pipeline().parameters.ExtrRunCycle}) SELECT stg.* FROM stg

text.value: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.RSH_TMP_IdsLfstylRateFctrRowCntBal; SELECT SRC_LFSTYL_RATE_FCTR_ID, SRC_MBR_LFSTYL_BNF_CD, SRC_LFSTYL_RATE_FCTR_EFF_DT, SRC_SRC_SYS_CD, TRGT_LFSTYL_RATE_FCTR_ID, TRGT_MBR_LFSTYL_BNF_CD, TRGT_LFSTYL_RATE_FCTR_EFF_DT, TRGT_SRC_SYS_CD INTO @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.RSH_TMP_IdsLfstylRateFctrRowCntBal FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.STG_TMP_IdsLfstylRateFctrRowCntBal WHERE SRC_LFSTYL_RATE_FCTR_ID IS NULL OR SRC_MBR_LFSTYL_BNF_CD IS NULL OR SRC_LFSTYL_RATE_FCTR_EFF_DT IS NULL OR SRC_SRC_SYS_CD IS NULL OR TRGT_LFSTYL_RATE_FCTR_ID IS NULL OR TRGT_MBR_LFSTYL_BNF_CD IS NULL OR TRGT_LFSTYL_RATE_FCTR_EFF_DT IS NULL OR TRGT_SRC_SYS_CD IS NULL; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.NTFY_TMP_IdsLfstylRateFctrRowCntBal; SELECT TOP 1 'ROW COUNT BALANCING FACETS - IDS LFSTYL_RATE_FCTR IS OUT OF TOLERANCE' AS NOTIFICATION INTO @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.NTFY_TMP_IdsLfstylRateFctrRowCntBal FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.STG_TMP_IdsLfstylRateFctrRowCntBal WHERE '@{pipeline().parameters.ToleranceCd}'='OUT'

Description:
PROCESSING:  This job runs Balancing Full Outer Join SQL on LFSTYL_RATE_FCTR and B_LFSTYL_RATE_FCTR tables to find out if there are any fallouts.
